title: SessionHeaderClient — Session Page Title with Inline Name Edit
problem: The session clip list needs a page title that shows the session name and allows inline rename (tap to edit). The rename must PATCH to Postgres immediately — no separate save button.
analysis:
SessionHeaderClient renders the page header for the session clip list page. Uses InlineEdit component for the session name. Session name is the h1/page title. Renders as a client component because InlineEdit requires interactivity.

Also renders the '+ New Clip' or session-level action buttons in the header right slot (passed to PageLayout's headerRight prop).
successCriteria:
- Session name rendered as tappable InlineEdit (max 40ch)
- Tap → keyboard opens, inline input
- Save (Return) → PATCH /api/sessions/[sessionId] { name }, page title updates immediately
- Cancel (blur/Escape) → reverts to original name
- Header right slot: '+ New Clip' for Recorder/Editor, absent for Member
implementation: components/sessions/SessionHeaderClient.tsx: 'use client'. Props { session, canEdit }. Uses InlineEdit for session.name with onSave calling PATCH API.
userGuide: Tap the session name at the top of a session to rename it. Changes are saved automatically when you press Return.
